subcodes.first_line: O thou who makest mention of Me! Hearken unto My call from the precincts of My prison, and ponder My Cause and that which hath befallen My Person, then behold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ذاکری اسمع ندائی عن شطر سجنی و تفکر فی امری و ما ورد علی نفسی ثم انظر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power of the Manifestation of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
